activities_projects.title: Locate India on the World Map
activities_projects.objective: Understand the geographical location of India
steps: Open a world map or atlas
Locate the continent of Asia
Identify and mark India on the map
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the location of India in the world
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of India on the map (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Identify the Tropic of Cancer
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the Tropic of Cancer
steps: Find the Tropic of Cancer in the atlas
Observe how it passes through India
Write the states through which it passes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the geographical division of India
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy in listing the states (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mark India's Latitudinal and Longitudinal Extent
steps: Find the latitudes and longitudes of India in the atlas
Note the northernmost and southernmost latitudes
Write the easternmost and westernmost longitudes

activities_projects.title: List India's Neighbouring Countries
steps: Look at the map of India
Identify countries sharing land borders with India
Write their names in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about India's neighbouring countries

activities_projects.title: Island Groups of India
steps: Locate the Arabian Sea and Bay of Bengal on the map
Find the island groups in these regions
Write their names in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize the island groups of India

activities_projects.title: Standard Meridian Activity
steps: Find the Standard Meridian of India in the atlas
Observe the longitude passing through Mirzapur
Write why it is used for Indian Standard Time
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how standard time is decided

activities_projects.title: Map Marking of Indian Seas
steps: Take an outline map of India
Mark the Arabian Sea on the west
Mark the Bay of Bengal on the east

activities_projects.title: Countries Larger than India
activities_projects.objective: Learn about India's rank in area
steps: Read about the seven largest countries in the world
List the countries larger than India
Write India's rank among them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand India's size compared to other countries

activities_projects.title: Importance of India's Location
steps: Read the section 'India and the World'
Identify how India's location helps trade and contact
Write two advantages
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the significance of India's location

activities_projects.title: Short Paragraph on India’s Location
steps: Think about India's location in Asia
Write a short paragraph describing it
Include latitude, longitude and neighbouring countries
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of paragraph (10 marks)
